name: LG_UPDSHIPPEDAMOUNT_002_01
definition:
CREATE PROCEDURE LG_UPDSHIPPEDAMOUNT_002_01 (
 @stTransRef INT
 ,@ordTransRef INT
 ,@sourceLink INT
 ,@amount FLOAT
 ,@stTransDate DATETIME
 ,@stUinfo1 FLOAT
 ,@stUinfo2 FLOAT
 ,@coef INT
 )
AS
BEGIN
 DECLARE @stShippedAmount FLOAT
  ,@stShippedRsrvAmount FLOAT
  ,@shippedAmount FLOAT
  ,@existsShpAmount FLOAT
  ,@orfShippedAmount FLOAT
  ,@c_amount FLOAT
  ,@orfAmount FLOAT
  ,@orfRsrvAmount FLOAT
  ,@uinfo1 FLOAT
  ,@uinfo2 FLOAT
  ,@convFactor FLOAT
  ,@stConvFactor FLOAT
  ,@diffAmount FLOAT
  ,@diffRsrvAmount FLOAT
  DECLARE @FRMNR INT
  DECLARE @EFFORDVAL VARCHAR(101)
  SELECT @FRMNR = CAST('002' AS SMALLINT)
  SELECT @EFFORDVAL = VALUE FROM "TIGER3"..L_FIRMPARAMS
 WHERE FIRMNR = @FRMNR AND CODE='SALES_RETEFFECTORDER'
 IF (@coef = - 1)
 BEGIN
  DELETE
  FROM LG_002_01_STSHIPPEDAMOUNT
  WHERE TRANSREF = @stTransRef
 END
 ELSE
 BEGIN
  SELECT @stShippedAmount = 0
  SELECT @stShippedRsrvAmount = 0
  SELECT @shippedAmount = 0
  SELECT @orfAmount = AMOUNT
   ,@orfRsrvAmount = RESERVEAMOUNT
   ,@orfShippedAmount = SHIPPEDAMOUNT
   ,@uinfo1 = UINFO1
   ,@uinfo2 = UINFO2
  FROM LG_002_01_ORFLINE WITH (NOLOCK)
  WHERE LOGICALREF = @ordTransRef
  EXECUTE LG_CONVFACT @uinfo1
   ,@uinfo2
   ,@convFactor OUTPUT
  EXECUTE LG_CONVFACT @stUinfo1
   ,@stUinfo2
   ,@stConvFactor OUTPUT
  SELECT @c_amount = @amount * @stConvFactor
  SELECT @orfAmount = @orfAmount * @convFactor
  SELECT @orfRsrvAmount = @orfRsrvAmount * @convFactor
  IF (@sourcelink <> 0)
  BEGIN
   SET @diffAmount = @orfShippedAmount - @orfAmount
   IF (@diffAmount > 0)
   BEGIN
    IF (@c_amount > @diffAmount)
     SELECT @stShippedAmount = - 1 * (@c_amount - @diffAmount)
    ELSE
     SELECT @stShippedAmount = 0
   END
   ELSE
    SELECT @stShippedAmount = - 1 * @c_amount
   SET @diffRsrvAmount = @orfShippedAmount - @orfRsrvAmount
   IF (@diffRsrvAmount >= 0)
   BEGIN
    IF (@c_amount > @diffRsrvAmount)
     SELECT @stShippedRsrvAmount = - 1 * (@c_amount - @diffRsrvAmount)
    ELSE
     SELECT @stShippedRsrvAmount = 0
   END
   ELSE
    SELECT @stShippedRsrvAmount = - 1 * @c_amount
  END
  ELSE
  BEGIN
   SELECT @shippedAmount = COALESCE(SUM(ST.AMOUNT * (ST.UINFO2 / ST.UINFO1)), 0)
    ,@existsShpAmount = COALESCE(SUM(SHP.SHIPPEDAMOUNT), 0)
   FROM LG_002_01_STLINE ST WITH (NOLOCK)
   LEFT OUTER JOIN LG_002_01_STSHIPPEDAMOUNT SHP WITH (NOLOCK)
    ON (ST.LOGICALREF = SHP.TRANSREF)
   WHERE ST.ORDTRANSREF = @ordTransRef
    AND ST.LOGICALREF <> @stTransRef
    AND ST.DATE_ <= @stTransDate
    AND ST.CANCELLED = 0
    AND ST.SOURCELINK = 0 --- Yeni kosul eklenmistir.
        AND ST.LOGICALREF NOT IN (SELECT SOURCELINK from LG_002_01_STLINE WHERE ORDTRANSREF = @ordTransRef)
   IF (@existsShpAmount <> 0)
    SELECT @shippedAmount = @existsShpAmount
   IF (@orfAmount - @shippedAmount > 0)
   BEGIN
    IF (@c_amount > (@orfAmount - @shippedAmount))
     SELECT @stShippedAmount = @orfAmount - @shippedAmount
    ELSE
     SELECT @stShippedAmount = @c_amount
   END
   ELSE
    SELECT @stShippedAmount = 0
   IF (@orfRsrvAmount - @shippedAmount > 0)
   BEGIN
    IF (@c_amount > (@orfRsrvAmount - @shippedAmount))
     SELECT @stShippedRsrvAmount = @orfRsrvAmount - @shippedAmount
    ELSE
     SELECT @stShippedRsrvAmount = @c_amount
   END
   ELSE
    SELECT @stShippedRsrvAmount = 0
  END
  IF NOT EXISTS (
    SELECT *
    FROM LG_002_01_STSHIPPEDAMOUNT
    WHERE TRANSREF = @stTransRef
    )
  BEGIN
   IF (@sourcelink <> 0)
   BEGIN
    INSERT INTO LG_002_01_STSHIPPEDAMOUNT (
     TRANSREF
     ,ORDTRANSREF
     ,SHIPPEDAMOUNT
     ,SHIPPEDRSRVAMT
     )
    VALUES (
     @stTransRef
     ,@ordTransRef
     ,0
     ,0
     )
    IF (LTRIM(@EFFORDVAL) = '1')
         BEGIN UPDATE LG_002_01_STSHIPPEDAMOUNT
        SET SHIPPEDAMOUNT = SHIPPEDAMOUNT + @stShippedAmount
              ,SHIPPEDRSRVAMT = SHIPPEDRSRVAMT + @stShippedRsrvAmount
           WHERE TRANSREF = @sourcelink
         END
   END
   ELSE
   BEGIN
    INSERT INTO LG_002_01_STSHIPPEDAMOUNT (
     TRANSREF
     ,ORDTRANSREF
     ,SHIPPEDAMOUNT
     ,SHIPPEDRSRVAMT
     )
    VALUES (
     @stTransRef
     ,@ordTransRef
     ,@stShippedAmount
     ,@stShippedRsrvAmount
     )
   END
  END
  ELSE
  BEGIN
   IF (@sourcelink <> 0)
    BEGIN IF (LTRIM(@EFFORDVAL) = '1')
             BEGIN UPDATE LG_002_01_STSHIPPEDAMOUNT
                     SET SHIPPEDAMOUNT = SHIPPEDAMOUNT + @stShippedAmount
                 ,SHIPPEDRSRVAMT = SHIPPEDRSRVAMT + @stShippedRsrvAmount
            WHERE TRANSREF = @sourcelink
               END
        END
   ELSE
    UPDATE LG_002_01_STSHIPPEDAMOUNT
    SET SHIPPEDAMOUNT = @stShippedAmount
     ,SHIPPEDRSRVAMT = @stShippedRsrvAmount
    WHERE TRANSREF = @stTransRef
  END
 END
END
